text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
We've been requested to make a<n>video by the
person in charge of the<n>academy's PR. As we're
getting<n>ready...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe you agreed to help on<n>such short
notice!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaah ha ha ha! It is but my fate to<n>be drawn to
the stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Now, let us carve my beauty into the<n>digital world!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whoagh! You're as charming as ever<n>today!
...Victory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Of course we are! I'm gonna be the<n>flower
garnishing my oshi's sunny<n>stage!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Both your spirit and your costume are<n>stunning!
It's as if I'm escorting you<n>into high society.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... thank you! Ohhh, I'm sho glab<n>to be alibe...
I'm sho glab I made this<n>for my Umas' shake!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Oho. So, you've put special attention<n>into your
outfit, yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Th-that's right! I've already thought<n>up at least a
hundred different design<n>ideas for how to
accentuate the<n>cuteness of all the other
Umamusume<n>while we race!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The most important thing is using<n>white as a base
color! I was very<n>careful to pick a material that
would<n>really make the other racers pop, and<n>I did
a pretty good job if I do say so<n>myself!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, and I chose a color scheme<n>meant to blend in
with the colors of all<n>the others!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Oh, and the reason for all the little<n>accessories
sprinkled all over was<n>because I wanted to be like
an<n>accessory to the other Umas! To<n>complement
them! And then, after<n>that...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Ah! My apologies! I got carried<n>away! So sorry!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Bravo! You've thought long and hard<n>about each
article of clothing!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
While running on the turf yourself,<n>you also
perceive its stage from the<n>eyes of a director—a
Renaissance girl<n>if I've ever known one!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
And more than anything... beyond that<n>attention to
detail lies the will and<n>desire to produce the
greatest of<n>races, for yourself and for your
opponents.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The footage we're shooting today is<n>meant to
bring in new students,<n>correct? I feel confident
entrusting the<n>details to you.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? What?! You want to givethat kind of responsibility to me?!Wh-wh-what should I do, Trainer?!
choice_data_list:
Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Maybe it would be good for you both to
collaborate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: What? What?! You want to givethat kind of responsibility to me?!Wh-wh-what should I do, Trainer?!
choice_data_list:
Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Let's make the greatest video that you can think
of!

Maybe it would be good for you both to
collaborate.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Opera O's magnificent existence<n>alone banishes
darkness from the<n>world! It'd be a crime for me to
monopolize the production!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
One who shines light upon the world<n>is essentially
the sun itself! I want<n>that image at the forefront!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
The sun... My, that has a glorious ring<n>to it. Tell me
more!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
G-g-give me a minute... I think I'm<n>about to
explode with joy! I swear on<n>this outfit I'll make
the best video<n>ever!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
And so, the video production<n>proceeds under
Agnes Digital's<n>direction.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
...And that's a wrap! I knew having<n>you on board
was a game-winning<n>call!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
All that's left is to edit everything.<n>...So, uh... Should
I go ahead and do<n>that as well?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Sometimes, it is best to let others take<n>the stage.
The Overlord shall sit back<n>and await the beautiful
final product.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaah ha ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh... Bwilliant to da berry end... I<n>swear, I'll simp
for her as long as I<n>live!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
I wonder what kind of video it'll end<n>up being. Full
of anticipation, we<n>disperse for the day.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Even if you can't see which path to<n>take. Even if
you lose sight of the<n>guidepost pointing you
toward<n>tomorrow...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...You'll definitely find it—your own<n>personal sun!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Come, let us aim for glory together!<n>Haaah ha ha
ha ha!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
A place where ambitions take flight.<n>Soar toward
your dreams! Tracen<n>Academy!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
How about "Opera O's smile lights up<n>the world"
for our concept?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Beautiful! There are no better words<n>to convey
said message. What would<n>you say to becoming
the promoter for<n>my concerts?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Nngh?! Y-you can't mean that! Oh, Iam going to explooooode!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
After that, the number of applications<n>to the
academy increase, making the<n>promotion video a
huge success!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh! Good thinking! I'm just dying<n>to see Opera
O at work!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Then, why don't I write the script and<n>you do the
editing? With two leads,<n>we'll have a huge hit on
our hands!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Wait a minute... You mean I'mgoing to be in your story?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
R-r-remember, we're planning to film<n>this! Don't
you think adding me<n>would be taking too many
liberties?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And... action! Come with me!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, so this is Tracen Academy?!<n>From here, I
shall take my very first<n>step as Overlord!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
...Now, you're going to play an older<n>student.
Come stand here and block<n>my path!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ohohoho! I wonder if a greenhorn like<n>yourself
even has what it takes to<n>survive.

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Very good! As magnificent as the<n>opening to an
epic poem!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I met you. It's thanks to<n>you that I
could become the Overlord!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hmph... I won't lose next time. Our<n>real fight starts
now!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: And that's a wrap! I think we've<n>done a fine job.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Pwaaaah! Gasp! Apologies! Wewere so close the whole time! I didn'ttouch you, did I?!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Speaking of touching... That's right! I<n>completely
forgot the scene where I<n>cradle you in my arms
after you fall<n>down in exhaustion!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
KYAAAGHK?! I don't think I'm going<n>to survive
this!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Agnes Digital puts her life on the line<n>and
manages to finish all the filming!
